description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden shelving unit with a dark brown finish. The front features two open shelves above a lower cabinet section with two glass-paneled doors, each fitted with a small, square metallic handle. The sides are flat and unadorned, emphasizing the clean, modern lines of the piece. The cabinet doors are slightly recessed and framed in a darker material, likely painted or stained wood, providing a subtle contrast to the rest of the unit. The shelves are spacious and suitable for storing books, decorative items, or other household objects. The overall construction appears sturdy, making it suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential interiors.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden shelving unit with two open shelves and a lower cabinet featuring glass-paneled doors and metallic handles. The design is modern and sturdy, ideal for storage or display.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat, unadorned profile of the shelving unit.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the solid, featureless back panel of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the flat profile seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Front view revealing two open shelves and a lower cabinet with glass-paneled doors and metallic handles.
